dotnetVersion.description: Base TFM for the WinUI project (for example net10.0).

publisherDn.description: Publisher distinguished name stored in Package.appxmanifest.

publisherDisplay.description: Publisher display name stored in Package.appxmanifest.

windowsAppSdkVersion.description: Pin to a specific Windows App SDK NuGet version. Leave empty for latest.

windowsSdkBuildToolsVersion.description: Pin to a specific Windows SDK BuildTools NuGet version. Leave empty for latest.

windowsSdkBuildToolsWinAppVersion.description: Pin to a specific Windows SDK BuildTools WinApp NuGet version. Leave empty for latest.

mstestVersion.description: Pin to a specific MSTest NuGet version. Leave empty for latest.

microsoftNetTestSdkVersion.description: Pin to a specific Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk NuGet version. Leave empty for latest.
